# Verdara Ultra — verdaraultra.com

A 4/42 deterministic environmental engine for outdoor terrain, weather, and biological systems. Built in the Lume programming language.

## What It Does

- 42-node deterministic engine with 4 environmental flow primitives
- Interactive dashboard with real-time node visualization
- Scenario simulation (terrain conditions, weather events)
- 3D sphere visualization mode
- Inspector panel with per-node state history

## Tech Stack

- **Source**: `.lume` files (Lume natural language compiler)
- **Build**: Custom build pipeline
- **3D**: Canvas-based visualization
- **Hosting**: Render (static site)

## Local Development

```bash
# Build and serve (requires Lume compiler)
node build.js
npx serve dist
```
